review_notes: Migrated creator-kit skills and agents into plugins/skill-creator while retaining creator-kit as the old source during the trial period.
Adjusted plugin.json to the current Claude CLI plugin schema; skills, agents, and hooks are discovered from conventional directories.
Regenerated .claude skills and agents as symlinks pointing to plugins/skill-creator.
Preserved .claude/settings.json user-managed values; INV-1 hash comparison passed.

DoD-7 is accepted by executable recognition evidence: Claude Code CLI is installed, plugin validation passes, and all 20 .claude/skills entries are relative symlinks to plugins/skill-creator with SKILL.md present.
